items.title: AMD is reportedly developing an entry-level RDNA 4 GPU with 8GB of VRAM - RX 9050 rumored to debut with 2048 cores, more than RX 9060
items.summary: AMD is allegedly planning to launch an RX 9050 SKU to compete with the RTX 5050, featuring more cores than the OEM-exclusive RX 9060.
